mapper.select: SELECT order_id, order_no, imp_uid, total_amount, payment_status, created_at FROM orders WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND payment_status = 'PAID' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.kit_id, k.name AS product_name, k.main_image1 AS image_url, oi.quantity, oi.price, CASE WHEN r.review_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reviewed FROM order_items oi JOIN kit k ON oi.kit_id = k.kit_id LEFT JOIN kit_shop_review r ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, kit_id, quantity, price, created_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{kitId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, NOW())
